metadata.name: Docker Cleanup
metadata.description:
Ansible playbook to clean up Docker resources. Removes dangling images by default, with optional cleanup of non-dangling images, containers, volumes, and networks.

Project: https://www.docker.com
Documentation: https://docs.docker.com/engine/reference/commandline/system_prune/
metadata.author: Christian Lempa

variables.name: cleanup_nondangling
variables.title: Also Prune Non-Dangling Images
variables.description: Also prune non-dangling images (unused tagged images), in addition to always cleaning dangling images
